description: Istara Pre-Release Test Marathon — 70+ scenarios across 13 cycles

cycles.name: API Exhaustive
cycles.description: Core API endpoints, project CRUD, task CRUD, file handling, data migration

cycles.name: Browser UI + WCAG
cycles.description: Playwright: navigate all views, screenshot, axe-core, keyboard shortcuts, dark mode

cycles.name: Agent & Skills
cycles.description: Chat, skill execution, agent identity, self-evolution, content guard, skill creation

cycles.name: Findings & RAG
cycles.description: Upload docs, chunking, retrieval precision, Laws of UX tagging, evidence chain

cycles.name: Channels & Deployments
cycles.description: Channel CRUD, webhook simulation, deployment lifecycle, analytics

cycles.name: Security & Auth
cycles.description: JWT enforcement, admin-only ops, field encryption, user management, security headers, login UX, team mode

cycles.name: Multi-Model & Network
cycles.description: Network LLM discovery, relay node, compute pool, model switching, session persistence

cycles.name: Stitch & Figma
cycles.description: Design integration: Stitch MCP, Figma REST API, screen generation

cycles.name: Database & Infrastructure
cycles.description: DB audit, vector health, finding chains, backup system, process hardening

cycles.name: WebSocket & Loops
cycles.description: WebSocket events, scheduled loops, notifications, history

cycles.name: Autoresearch & Meta
cycles.description: Autoresearch config, experiments, leaderboard, meta-hyperagent observations

cycles.name: Full Pipeline E2E
cycles.description: Complete research workflow: upload → analyze → findings → insights → recommendations

cycles.name: Installation & CLI
cycles.description: Shell installer, CLI management, tray app integration, uninstaller, first-run login UX
